name: invoicepilot
description: Download all your SaaS invoices with one command. Supports AWS, Twilio, MongoDB, Zoho, GoDaddy, Google Cloud, Stripe, and OpenPhone.
author: InvoicePilot

tools.name: invoicepilot_download
tools.description: Download invoices from all configured SaaS services for a given date range

tools.name: invoicepilot_list
tools.description: List all configured invoice connectors and their status
